data.title: LG ELECTRONICS' WASHTOWER™ SURPASSES 3.2 MILLION UNITS SOLD WORLDWIDE
data.description: LG Electronics' innovative LG WashTower™ has been embraced by customers globally, with over 3.2 million units sold. This milestone demonstrates the strong demand for LG's space- and energy-efficient laundry solution. The product's success highlights its proven track record of meeting customer needs on a worldwide scale.

data.title: EPG Adds Over US$100 Million in Series B+ Financing, Expanding Strategic Backing for Global AI Data Center Growth
data.description: In Singapore on March 31, 2026, tech company EPG has successfully secured more than $100 million in Series B+ funding. This investment was spearheaded by Decarbonization Partners, a collaboration between BlackRock and Temasek, as well as contributions from Alibaba Cloud and various other key investors. The latest financing round further bolsters the progress made in EPG's earlier Series B funding round.

data.title: Forescout Appoints Tsuyoshi Kitagawa as Country Manager for Japan
data.description: Tokyo - Forescout Technologies, a prominent cybersecurity company, has appointed Tsuyoshi Kitagawa as the Regional Director and Country Manager for Japan. Kitagawa will be responsible for overseeing the company's operations and expansion in Japan, with a focus on strengthening its position as a key security partner for organizations facing increasing regulatory and operational challenges. This move comes at a time when Japan is experiencing a notable transformation in its cybersecurity environment, reflecting growing importance in the region.

data.title: AUO Lights Up Touch Taiwan 2026 with Leading Micro LED Innovation
data.description: Display interfaces play a crucial role in the integration of physical artificial intelligence (AI), transitioning from mass production to practical implementation, facilitating new smart mobility applications. This advancement involves moving towards real-world deployment and leveraging these interfaces for enhanced functionality. The integration of display interfaces is pivotal in enabling the application of AI in physical systems, with the number of deployments increasing rapidly. This shift towards practical implementation underscores the significance of display interfaces in the development and utilization of AI technology in smart mobility applications, highlighting their key role in the deployment of physical AI solutions.
